3274010.name: Zoomageddon
3274010.description:
This is Zoomageddon: a story-driven dungeon crawler shooter with a dash of playful humor. It blends chaotic bullet-heaven survival with strategic, procedurally-generated dungeons... all wrapped in gorgeous pixel art with dynamic modern lighting and a slick, colorful UI.

OVERVIEW

The Zoomageddon happened. The world's a mess, mutant animals are everywhere, and the tyrannical Rat King is calling the shots.

Society's only hope? Oyen, a lone orange cat serving in the Neo-Pankou military. (He's probably just in it for the snacks.)

What starts as a simple mission to destroy a rat's nest unravels a "Trail of Mysteries" that will challenge everything Oyen (and you) thought you knew about the ancient Chinese Zodiac. Turns out, the Great Race was less of a friendly jog and more of a chaotic, backstabbing bloodsport.

KEY FEATURES (Playable Now in the Demo!)

  • Modern Pixel Art: Dive into a beautifully crafted pixel-art world, brought to life with dynamic modern lighting, slick shaders, and a vibrant, colorful UI.

  • Frantic Bullet-Heaven Combat: Survive against massive hordes of mutant enemies! Mow 'em down, level up, and unleash an arsenal of quirky and powerful abilities.

  • Procedurally-Generated Dungeons: No two runs are the same! Crawl through ever-changing, procedurally-generated dungeon layouts. Every run is a new map filled with new challenges, secrets, and... mostly... mutants.

  • Build & Upgrade Your Bunker: The bunker is your customizable hub and home!

    • Gather Elemental Essences and resources in the dungeon.

    • Use the Zodiac Forge to craft powerful new weapons for your arsenal.

    • Pray to the RNG gods at the Zodiac Shrine to unlock new abilities for future runs.

    • Hit the Training Gym for permanent, meta-progressing stat upgrades.

    • Make it home! Use the Decoration Builder to customize your personal bunker space.

  • A Story-Driven Mystery: You're not just surviving; you're investigating. Begin the "Trail of Mysteries" and uncover the dark truth behind the Zoomageddon and the Rat King's rise.

  • Hunt the Rooster Zodiac (Chapter 1 Demo): Track down, challenge, and defeat the boss of the first chapter—the twisted Rooster Zodiac! The demo features the first of a planned 5-chapter saga, each culminating in a unique Zodiac boss fight.

UNRAVEL THE ZODIAC CONSPIRACY

The Rooster is just the beginning. Each of the 5 planned chapters will unravel a new piece of the conspiracy. Zoomageddon blends the fast-paced, "one-more-run" addiction of a bullet-heaven with the narrative depth and strategic planning of a dungeon crawler. Every run pushes the story forward. Every death is a chance to upgrade your bunker.

Do you have what it takes to survive the Zoomageddon, expose the truth, and finally put the Rat King in his place?

Play the Demo & Wishlist now!
